subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-24
subcodes.first_line: When a person desires to destroy his house to build a new one on its site, first of all he must make the plan ready, then the bricks
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @unity; oneness of humanity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
